name: John Marshall Bancorp, Inc.
summary: Part I General Overview John Marshall Bancorp,Inc. was organized as a Virginia corporation in 2016 to serve as the holding company for John Marshall Bank. The Company and the Bank are each headquartered in Reston, Virginia (approximately 20 miles west of Washington, D.C.). The Company commenced operations as a bank holding company on March1, 2017 following a reorganization transaction in which it became the Banks holding company.
